text: John Bartell here. We are at Lake Berryessa. This is Spanish Flats, right off of Highway 128. More specifically, I am on a hill, Mulford Road, Mulford Drive, I believe. Just extreme devastation from the fires up here. Multiple, multiple homes. This is. I moved up on this hill just to get a little vantage point. There's just too many streets to name right now where the devastation has happened out here. Multiple marinas. We've seen boats in the water, like sunk entire docks, been underwater. The the fire damage here is just devastating, and it's going to take a long time for this community to come back. If you can see here, also, look at the just power lines everywhere. We're we're we're not even on Highway 128. Highway 128 is just littered with down power lines, power lines, just like this, and that's why you can't get up here.
